name: Anika Sharma
title: My go-to kurta brand
review: I ordered the Mint Green Airy Linen Short Kurta and honestly it exceeded every expectation. The fabric is breathable and so soft — I wore it on a 35-degree day and stayed completely comfortable. The mandarin collar gives it a clean, elevated look without trying too hard. I've already recommended it to three friends. Saadaa really understands what everyday dressing should feel like.

name: Rhea Kapoor
title: Linen done right
review: I've tried linen from a lot of brands and most either feel too stiff or go limp after one wash. Saadaa's linen is different — it stays soft and holds its shape. The Short Kurta fits beautifully at size M, not too oversized, not too fitted. The colour was exactly what I saw on the website. Will definitely be buying the Yellow one next.

name: Meera Pillai
title: Simple, clean, well-made
review: Ordered the Beige Cotton Pant and the Short Kurta together. Both arrived well-packaged and the quality is genuinely good for the price. The cotton pant has a comfortable elastic waist and the fit is relaxed without looking shapeless. My one small note — the size chart could be slightly more detailed — but the pieces themselves are excellent. Wearing them almost every day now.

name: Divya Nair
title: Exactly what I was looking for
review: I've been looking for a brand that makes honest, simple clothes without too much embellishment or trend-chasing. Saadaa is exactly that. The Linen Kurta feels premium but is priced reasonably. Washed it twice now — no shrinkage, no fading. The stitching is clean throughout. This is the kind of wardrobe staple you keep for years.

name: Sanya Khanna
title: Wore it straight from the package
review: No ironing needed, no breaking in period — just put it on and felt great. The Short Kurta in Mint Green has that effortless look that's hard to find. The 3/4 sleeves are the perfect length. Fit was true to size at L. Delivery was faster than expected too. One of my favourite online purchases this year.

name: Ishita Roy
title: Best basics brand I've found
review: Everything from Saadaa just works. Simple cuts, quality fabric, great sizing.

name: Tanvi Mehta
title: Comfortable all day
review: Wore the linen kurta for a 10-hour work day and it looked as fresh in the evening as it did in the morning.

name: Preethi Subramanian
title: True to colour
review: The Mint Green is exactly as shown — not too bright, not too washed out. Rare for online shopping.

name: Zara Qureshi
title: Second purchase, won't be my last
review: Bought the Short Kurta first, loved it so much I immediately ordered the Long Kurta. Saadaa has a loyal customer in me.

name: Nidhi Gupta
title: Clean finish, no loose threads
review: Quality control is impressive. Everything was stitched perfectly and the fabric felt premium right out of the bag.

name: Aarohi Jain
title: Lightweight and cool
review: Perfect summer staple. The linen barely feels like you're wearing anything.

name: Kritika Bose
title: Great fit at every size
review: Ordered 2XL — fits perfectly and looks just as good as the model images.

name: Puja Ahluwalia
title: Washes well
review: Three washes in and still looks brand new. No pilling, no shrinking.

name: Supriya Datta
title: Saadaa gets basics right
review: Simple silhouette, great fabric. Exactly what basics should be.

name: Falak Mirza
title: Everyday favourite
review: Reaches for this kurta every other day. That says everything.
